title: Request-line parsing + header metadata extraction
description:
Parse request-line into method/URI/version components. Accumulate Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding, Connection during header parse. Expose via request_meta(). Case-insensitive metadata extraction.

Files: carriage/src/http/frame.rs, carriage/src/http/codec.rs, carriage/tests/codec_test.rs, carriage/tests/frame_test.rs

```validation
{"content_check": [{"file": "carriage/src/http/frame.rs", "pattern": "pub enum HttpMethod"}, {"file": "carriage/src/http/codec.rs", "pattern": "fn request_meta"}], "tests": "cargo test --package carriage request_line_parsed"}
```

title: Body framing (Content-Length, chunked, close-delimited)
description:
Create BodyFramer with RFC 7230 body determination rules. Integrate into parser to replace raw passthrough after headers. Add EndOfMessage variant to ParsedData. TE precedence over CL.

Files: carriage/src/http/body.rs (NEW), carriage/src/http/parser.rs, carriage/src/http/mod.rs, train_track/src/atom/frame.rs, carriage/tests/body_test.rs (NEW)

```validation
{"files_exist": ["carriage/src/http/body.rs"], "content_check": [{"file": "carriage/src/http/body.rs", "pattern": "pub enum BodyFramer"}], "tests": "cargo test --package carriage body_test"}
```

title: Response parsing + service loop restructure
description:
Create response codec mirroring request codec. Restructure do_connection into keep-alive loop. Replace blind tokio::io::copy with parsed response forwarding. Keep-alive for HTTP/1.1 default on, HTTP/1.0 default off.

Files: carriage/src/http/response.rs (NEW), train_track/src/core/service.rs, carriage/src/tcp/dest/native.rs, carriage/src/lib.rs, carriage/tests/response_test.rs (NEW), carriage/tests/integration_test.rs

```validation
{"files_exist": ["carriage/src/http/response.rs"], "content_check": [{"file": "train_track/src/core/service.rs", "pattern": "EndOfMessage"}], "tests": "cargo test --package carriage response_test"}
```

title: Hop-by-hop header stripping + proxy headers
description:
Extend pipeline with remove/insert actions. Strip 8 standard hop-by-hop headers + Connection-named headers. Add Via header. HTTP/1.0 clients never receive chunked. Wire into conductor builder.

Files: carriage/src/http/pipeline.rs, conductor/src/lib.rs, carriage/tests/pipeline_test.rs

```validation
{"content_check": [{"file": "carriage/src/http/pipeline.rs", "pattern": "hop_by_hop"}], "tests": "cargo test --package carriage hop_by_hop"}
```
